creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
eadler      2011-10-26 18:44:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/radsecproxy      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net/radsecproxy/files radsecproxy.in 
  Log:
  radsecproxy is a generic RADIUS proxy that in addition to to usual RADIUS
  UDP transport, also supports TLS (RadSec), as well as RADIUS over TCP and
  DTLS. The aim is for the proxy to have sufficient features to be flexible,
  while at the same time to be small, efficient and easy to configure.
  
  WWW: http://software.uninett.no/radsecproxy/
  
  PR:             ports/147943
  Submitted by:   Honza Betik <honza@betik.cz>
  Approved by:    bapt (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2396    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/net/radsecproxy/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/net/radsecproxy/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +46 -0     ports/net/radsecproxy/files/radsecproxy.in (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net/radsecproxy/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/radsecproxy/pkg-plist (new)
